title: Reference Primitive
description: Typed reference connecting source and target governed objects. Both endpoints conform to the Identity Primitive shape. Reference is immutable after creation and carries no execution semantics.

source_id.description: Logical identity of the source object. Conforms to the Identity Primitive id field.

source_uri.description: Canonical URI of the source object. Conforms to the Identity Primitive uri field.

relationship.description: Registry-controlled semantic relationship type from source to target. Must be registered before use.

target_id.description: Logical identity of the target object. Conforms to the Identity Primitive id field.

target_uri.description: Canonical URI of the target object. Conforms to the Identity Primitive uri field.
